def negative_object_allocated_in_tight_loop_expected_to_be_pooled():
    rule_id = "object_allocated_in_tight_loop_expected_to_be_pooled"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Heavyweight object such as HTTPSession or DB connection allocated fresh on every loop iteration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
